title: aubrieta canescens
intro: Aubrietta canescens, also known as Alkanet, is a flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alkanet include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Alkanet can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, with the latter being commonly used in skincare products to promote wound healing and improve skin tone.
